title: Release agent-utils v1.0.2 for kitty image preview extension
description: Bump the package version and publish a new git tag so Pi users pinned to git:github.com/harryaskham/agent-utils can install the kitty image preview and Tendril screenshot capture extension changes.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:5nefmjf5xnxv9naq

title: Realtime plugin: expose unified /rt usage through controls API
description: Follow-up after the command vocabulary and controls API work: the canonical /rt usage text is local to the slash-command handler, so future UI/extensions using pi.realtime cannot display the same help text without duplicating it. Move the usage string to a shared constant, expose usage()/help() on pi.realtime, route /rt help through it, add tests, and document the API. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Tendril sharing: add describe command for screenshot context
description: Follow-up to bd-9e7aed: add a user-facing /tendril describe or /tendril-describe command that captures a window/display via Tendril, sends the screenshot to a configurable image-capable description model, then injects a text user message with the visual description for the active model. Include tests and docs. Requested by Harry as the optional VLM description path for models that should not receive images directly.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Realtime plugin: fix status widget hide/off lifecycle
description: Audit finding from bd-db8405: /rt-hide-status clears the widget but does not set config.statusWidgetVisible=false, so later updateStatus calls can recreate the widget. Make hide/off/status transitions explicit and ensure /rt-off reliably clears realtime widget/status UI even if model restoration fails.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Implement Rust skill-server utility with MCP stdio meta-tool
description:
Implement a new Rust-based agent-utils utility called `skill-server` (`ss`) anchored around the `mcp-cli` crate, using Tendril as the reference for CLI/MCP stdio structure.

Goal:
- Provide both a CLI and stdio MCP server for dynamic skill/tool discovery without requiring agents to fully reload.
- Expose a single meta-tool / slash entrypoint for agents, conceptually `/ss <domain> <query-or-command>`.
- Example: `/ss web query ...` discovers a registered web-search MCP tool/server on the host and calls it.

Configuration:
- Read host configuration from `.config/ss/config.yaml` by default, with env/flag override if practical.
- Config should define skill search paths and MCP server definitions, e.g. paths to scan for Pi/Cacophony skills plus named MCP stdio servers/commands.
- Config should allow discovery of skills and other host MCP servers, including metadata needed to route a request to a matching server/tool.

Implementation expectations:
- Rust workspace/crate for `skill-server`/`ss`.
- Use or mirror Tendril's `mcp-cli` usage for JSON envelopes, CLI/MCP parity, and `mcp stdio` entrypoint design.
- Keep CLI and MCP execution paths unified.
- Implement a skeleton that builds first, with typed config loading, discovery abstractions, and a minimal meta-tool call path.
- Add tests/smokes for config parsing and MCP/CLI surface where feasible.

Acceptance criteria:
- `ss` (or `skill-server`) has a working CLI help surface.
- `ss mcp stdio` starts a stdio MCP server using mcp-cli-style plumbing.
- `.config/ss/config.yaml` sample/default is documented and supports search paths plus MCP server definitions.
- A minimal `/ss`-style meta request can discover a configured skill/server/tool and return a structured result or clear structured error.
- Build/test instructions are documented.

Filed from agnt-ctrl after Harry requested a new utility skill-server and pointed to Tendril's MCP CLI usage as the example.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Realtime plugin: route legacy aliases through unified /rt handler
description: Follow-up after bd-fd15b0/bd-5e0b27: the explicit /rt command vocabulary now exists, but several legacy slash commands still duplicate the same command logic inline. Route compatible aliases (/rt-on, /rt-off, /rt-audio, /rt-reasoning, /rt-listen, /rt-status, /rt-doctor, /rt-hide-status) through the unified /rt handler so future behavior changes stay centralized, preserving /rt-stop commit semantics where it differs. Add/adjust tests if needed. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Realtime plugin: expose supported command modes in controls API
description: Follow-up after bd-78ed46: /rt start, mic, and stt modes are now validated, but pi.realtime.options() only exposes voice/backend/reasoning values. Expose supported start/mic/stt command modes through the control options API, update docs, and cover with tests so future UI affordances can discover every validated selector from one place. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Anchor kitty image preview with Unicode placeholders in tmux
description: Fix the kitty image preview widget so images render at the widget location and scroll with the pane, especially under tmux. Use kitty graphics Unicode placeholder placement rather than only emitting APC display commands, preserve non-tmux behavior, update docs, and validate protocol serialization.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:5nefmjf5xnxv9naq

title: Build configurable app automation surface for API-less web apps
description: Create a Pi-native agent-utils extension shape for driving authenticated web apps such as Slack, Outlook, Teams, and canvas editors through deterministic Playwright/Tendril actions rather than bespoke one-off shell scripts. The extension should expose agent-visible tools, blessed app configs, persisted snapshots, and periodic refresh hooks. Filed from Harry request to build a Slack/canvas automation helper and generalize it into a tendril-app style app automation framework.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Wire Slack notifications to live Playwright DOM extraction
description: Use the app automation Playwright bridge to open/reuse Slack web, run the Slack extractor snippet, feed the extraction into slack.notifications.snapshot, and persist notifications.json/notifications.md without requiring agents to manually supply sourceText/sourceJson. Include auth-required behaviour and selector maintenance notes. Follow-up from bd-de1af2 and bd-ee8e57.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Realtime plugin: pass STT alias arguments through unified handler
description: Follow-up after /rt stt stop semantics: /stt and /rt-stt are legacy aliases for /rt stt, but they ignore their argument string, so /rt-stt stop or /stt stop cannot use the explicit stop path. Route alias arguments through the unified /rt handler, keep fallback behavior, and add tests/docs if needed. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Expose agent-side realtime call and Pulse device controls
description:
Operators currently can start Pi realtime calls through the user-facing `/rt` slash command, and the realtime extension can read Pulse routing from process environment such as `PI_RT_AUDIO_BACKEND=pulse`, `PULSE_SERVER=sgu24:4713`, `PULSE_SOURCE=source.bluetooth`, and `PULSE_SINK=...`. From the agent side, though, there is no first-class tool/API surface for managing a realtime call or selecting Pulse routing at runtime.

Observed in helsinki-cacophony-cluster-ctrl session while trying to satisfy Harry's request: "start a rt call with pulse on sgu24:4713 and device source.bluetooth". Inspection of `extensions/realtime-agent.js` and `docs/realtime-agent.md` showed `/rt start vad|ptt|nolisten`, `/rt backend pulse`, `/rt doctor`, and env/custom-command knobs, but no agent-callable tool for configuring `PULSE_SERVER` / `PULSE_SOURCE` / `PULSE_SINK`, starting/stopping/listening, or reporting call state.

Desired capability:
- Expose agent-side tools/control methods for realtime call lifecycle: start, stop, cancel, status/doctor, audio on/off, listen mode, STT mode.
- Expose safe runtime configuration for Pulse routing: server, source, sink, and/or explicit record/playback commands, ideally scoped to the active Pi session/call rather than requiring Pi process restart.
- Make the tool status clearly report the resolved backend and Pulse endpoints so agents can confirm the requested device is in use.
- Preserve the existing slash-command UX and safety boundaries; do not leak API keys or raw environment secrets in tool output.

Acceptance criteria:
- A managed Pi agent can start a realtime call using Pulse server `sgu24:4713` and source `source.bluetooth` without operator-only slash-command intervention or Pi process restart, assuming credentials and Pulse reachability exist.
- Agents can query status/doctor output and stop/cancel the call via the same agent-side surface.
- Documentation explains both the slash command and agent-side tool workflows.

Filed from helsinki Cacophony controller after Harry requested agent-managed realtime call support.

Coordination note: attempted twice to direct-message `pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl` after filing, but `caco msg send --project agent-utils --target pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl` failed retryably with `daemon_endpoint_transport_error` on `/api/v1/projects/agent-utils/messages/send` while `/api/v1/node` was reachable. Broadcast fallback succeeded as `msg-019e1b82-b256-7fe3-a5fc-abd460d006d1` so the agent-utils controller can pick up/triage the request.
creator: helsinki:cacophony:helsinki-cacophony-cluster-ctrl

title: Add Firecracker VM integration to CACO control plane
description:
Integrate the Firecracker VM controller with CACO (Cacao) control plane by creating a wire protocol/endpoint that allows:
- CACO agents to discover and manage Firecracker VMs
- Communication between caco-ctrl and Tendril agents managing VMs
- Registration of VMs as available execution environments
- Proper orchestration and scheduling of workloads to Firecracker VMs

Acceptance criteria:
- caco-ctrl can communicate with Firecracker VMs via the integration point
- CACO agents can dispatch work to Firecracker VMs
- VM availability is visible to the CACO control plane
- Integration handles VM lifecycle events
creator: ms-mac:_:node-token

title: Realtime plugin: normalize /rt voice arguments
description: Follow-up after /rt tuning command hardening: realtime voice names are all lowercase, but /rt voice passes user input through verbatim so mixed-case values such as Verse are rejected even though the intended option is unambiguous. Normalize voice input to lowercase before validation, keep unsupported values guarded, and add tests/docs. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Add app automation Playwright bridge for browser.open and DOM extraction
description: Implement the next app automation driver layer: turn high-level plan steps such as browser.open and dom.extract into a deterministic Playwright/playwright-cli bridge with session reuse, auth-missing reporting, script/evaluate support, safe command construction, and persisted extraction JSON. This should preserve the app_automation_run contract and avoid storing web auth secrets. Follow-up from the initial bd-ee8e57 stack.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Add app automation snapshot read and digest tools
description: Extend the app automation surface with first-class tools for agents to inspect persisted Slack, Outlook, Teams, calendar, and canvas snapshot artifacts from the state root without ad-hoc filesystem reads. Parent epic: bd-ee8e57. Filed while continuing the app automation/plugin build loop.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Rename ss binary to skill-search to avoid iproute2 conflict
description: Home-manager buildEnv fails because agent-utils exports bin/ss, which conflicts with iproute2's bin/ss. Rename the agent-utils binary to skill-search and update references. Filed from operator quick-fix request.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Realtime plugin: align /rt listen with listen control modes
description: Follow-up after listen-mode API validation: pi.realtime.listen() supports vad, ptt, and continuous, and /rt-listen continuous maps to VAD, but the explicit /rt listen path is validated with mic modes and rejects continuous. Split /rt listen validation from /rt mic, document the command in usage/docs, and add tests. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Tendril sharing: flat ImageContent + kitty preview
description: Bug: /tendril window/display sent images using Anthropic-style { source: { type: base64, mediaType, data } }, but Pi's ImageContent is flat { type: image, data, mimeType }, so models never received the screenshot. Also wire kitty preview so the user actually sees the screenshot in the terminal when sharing.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Wire Markdown canvas sync to live browser paste/import
description: Extend canvas.sync-markdown so a targetUrl and targetSelector can drive a live browser paste/import through Playwright or Tendril after writing latest.md/latest.html/paste.txt/sync.json. Keep write actions explicit and parameterized, include dry-run, and persist sync result metadata. Follow-up from bd-cb5a40 and bd-ee8e57.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Release agent-utils post-Firecracker fixes and restart ms-mac runner
description: Operator requested: land current fixes as releases and restart the GitHub runner on ms-mac. Scope: bump/package release metadata as needed, tag/publish the current agent-utils release, and restart the ms-mac runner service.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Realtime plugin: introduce explicit session state controller
description: Audit finding from bd-db8405: extensions/realtime-agent.js currently spreads realtime mode across config.audioEnabled, config.sttOnly, statusWidgetVisible, previousModel, session.connected, phase, mic, micMode, and forwardedMessageCount. Introduce an explicit controller/state machine for off/connected/listening/transcribing/responding/speaking/error so slash commands and future Pi API controls have one reliable source of truth. Keep Pulse as the intended default.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Realtime plugin: add explicit /rt help and STT stop semantics
description: Follow-up after the realtime command cleanup: /rt has a usage fallback but no explicit /rt help command, the registered command description omits the tuning verbs, and /rt stt only starts transcription mode even though the desired vocabulary called for stt start/stop semantics. Add /rt help plus /rt stt stop/off behavior, tests, and docs. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Publish missing v1.0.3 git tag
description: bd-a71b61 is closed and origin/main contains landed commit 0ff97087c35671d6111adc35b33e49153d8950a0. The internal/origin checkout has refs/tags/v1.0.3 at 0ff97087c35671d6111adc35b33e49153d8950a0 after git fetch --tags, but GitHub API refs/tags/v1.0.3 returns 404 and GitHub tag listing only shows v1.0.2, v1.0.1, and v1. Publish/push the v1.0.3 tag to GitHub and verify gh api repos/harryaskham/agent-utils/git/ref/tags/v1.0.3 returns the landed SHA.

title: Add app automation bundle refresh presets
description: Add a high-level app automation tool that starts a standard bundle of Slack, Outlook mail/calendar, and Teams notification/calendar refreshers from the blessed catalog, so agents can keep common API-less app snapshots current without manually starting each action one by one. Follow-up hardening after bd-ee8e57 delivery.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Realtime plugin: validate legacy alias arguments
description: Follow-up after /rt extra-argument validation: unified /rt rejects unexpected extra tokens, but several legacy aliases still ignore their own arguments or truncate them before delegation. Make no-argument aliases warn on unexpected args and pass full /rt-listen args through the unified handler so extra tokens are rejected consistently. Add tests/docs. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Add Pi kitty graphics image display extension
description: Implement a repo-local Pi extension/widget for persistent terminal image display using the kitty graphics protocol. Expose tools for Pi agents to add images or folders/series, navigate next/previous/indexed images, support autodetected streaming/in-memory/tmux passthrough paths, animations/transparency/z-index/background modes where feasible, and factor shared TypeScript kitty graphics protocol utilities for native image-posting integrations.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:5nefmjf5xnxv9naq

title: Realtime plugin: expose unified Pi API control surface
description: Audit finding from bd-db8405: realtime UX is controlled mostly by slash-command handlers that directly mutate config/session internals. Add a coherent control API for enable/disable, mic mode, audio output, status widget, voice/backend settings, and diagnostics so Pi UI affordances, commands, and scripts can share one stable interface.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Realtime plugin: validate /rt start and mic modes
description: Follow-up after the /rt command vocabulary cleanup: /rt start <mode> and /rt mic <mode> accept arbitrary values and currently fall through to a default mic mode, which can make typos start the wrong capture behavior. Validate modes explicitly, warn without changing state for unsupported values, and add tests/docs. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Realtime plugin: add unit tests for command and event lifecycle
description: Audit finding from bd-db8405: extensions/realtime-agent.js has no tests despite complex state/event handling. Add mocked Pi context and mocked realtime events/WebSocket coverage for command transitions, widget visibility, response finalisation, tool calls, transcription deduplication, close/error paths, and model restore behaviour.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Add Tendril screenshot capture tool to kitty image preview extension
description: Extend the repo Pi kitty image preview extension with a first-party tool that captures the most recent/target screenshot through the tendril CLI into a session-designated folder and auto-shows it in the persistent kitty graphics preview widget. Include session-local screenshot storage, configurable tendril target/output options, docs, and validation.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:5nefmjf5xnxv9naq

title: Realtime plugin tests need a cleaner WebSocket injection seam
description: While implementing bd-17bb1c, importing extensions/realtime-agent.js in node:test failed because ws is a peer dependency supplied by Pi at runtime, not by this package's local test install. I worked around it by loading a data-URL copy with a fake WebSocket class. A cleaner fix would extract the WebSocket constructor behind an injectable factory or module-local test seam so realtime unit tests do not need source-string patching. Filed via reflect-session mixin from bd-17bb1c session.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Add user controls for kitty image preview navigation
description: Users can see images via the kitty image preview plugin, but multi-image galleries currently lack discoverable/working user-side controls for next, previous, hide, and show. Add slash-command aliases such as /image-next and /image-prev plus TUI-discoverable control text so users can control the preview without agent MCP calls. Filed from Harry's interactive request.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Implement Firecracker VM controller for Tendril agents
description:
Create a Firecracker VM controller that can be orchestrated by Tendril agents, similar to how kitty images and Playwright are used. The VM should:
- Be controllable by Tendril agents
- Support running browsers and other configurable services
- Provide a visible screen interface comparable to existing kitty/Playwright implementations
- Include proper VM lifecycle management and initialization

Acceptance criteria:
- Firecracker VM can be spawned and controlled by Tendril agents
- Screen output is visible and accessible
- VM is configurable for different workloads (browsers, etc)
- Lifecycle events are properly tracked
creator: ms-mac:_:node-token

title: Add periodic app action refresh and persisted snapshot storage
description: Add a periodic runner model for app automation actions that can refresh notifications or canvas state on an interval and write canonical JSON/Markdown artifacts without daemon-global cron. Include status/list/stop controls and clear resource cleanup. Parent bd-ee8e57; depends on bd-bf9c5e.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Publish missing v1.0.2 git tag
description: Release bead bd-07984b closed and package.json on origin/main is version 1.0.2 at b844046, but after git fetch --tags the controller checkout does not see tag v1.0.2 (only v1.0.1/v1). Publish or repair the missing v1.0.2 git tag and verify it is visible from the canonical checkout/upstream.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Realtime plugin: wire or remove VAD threshold setting
description: Audit finding from bd-db8405: PI_RT_VAD_THRESHOLD is defaulted but does not appear to be used in the server VAD session payload, while PI_RT_VAD_SILENCE_MS is used. Either send threshold if supported by the realtime API or remove/rename/document the setting so users are not tuning a no-op.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Realtime plugin: add user guide for recommended workflows
description: Audit finding from bd-db8405: the realtime usage guide currently lives mostly in a large source-file header. Add README/docs coverage for full realtime conversation, PTT, VAD, STT-only, replay, device setup, Pulse-on-macOS phone sink/source workflow, and troubleshooting.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Tendril sharing: add /tendril list and screenshot-to-model commands
description: Implement the inverse of the current Tendril computer-use flow: user-facing /tendril command tree that lets the user list Tendril targets and share a captured window/display screenshot to the model as an image user message. Initial scope: /tendril list mirrors tendril list --json in readable form; /tendril window <id> and /tendril display <id> capture PNG via tendril capture --output, inject a structured user message with image content, and notify the user. Include tests and register the extension. Requested by Harry after realtime polish.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Realtime plugin: include boolean connection flags in state snapshots
description: Follow-up after the explicit state/controller work: RealtimeStateController exposes connected/connecting getters, but snapshot() only serializes the raw connection string. pi.realtime.snapshot().state consumers currently have to derive booleans themselves, and tests even had to coerce an absent connected field. Add connected/connecting booleans to state snapshots, cover with tests, and document the snapshot shape. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Seed GitHub Pages with tool inventory
description:
Create an initial GitHub Pages site for this repository that publishes a concise inventory of the tools and first-party surfaces available to agents/operators.

Scope:
- Add/enable a minimal GitHub Pages-compatible docs site for the repo.
- Include a tool inventory covering the Cacophony surfaces used by this project, such as bd, agent, msg, scratch, test, build, choices, cron, image generation, Pi loop/self-nudge/self-ops, tmux-cli, Tendril, and relevant repo-local tools.
- Keep the inventory generated or easy to update where practical; avoid duplicating stale long-form docs unnecessarily.
- Document how to preview/build the Pages content locally.
- Ensure the site can be published by GitHub Pages without requiring secrets or local-only state.

Acceptance criteria:
- A docs or Pages entry point exists and renders a tool inventory.
- The repo documents the Pages publishing path and local preview/build command.
- Validation appropriate for the chosen static site setup passes.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Clarify bead dependency semantics when linking tasks to parent epics
description: While filing bd-bf9c5e for the app automation architecture slice, I initially set its dependency to parent epic bd-ee8e57 and used --claim true. The claim failed because the task was considered blocked by the unresolved epic dependency, even though the intent was parent linkage rather than prerequisite gating. Consider documenting the parent-vs-dependency convention more prominently or adding a parent/epic link field so task filing does not accidentally make ready work blocked. Filed via reflect-session mixin from bd-bf9c5e session.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Realtime plugin: refresh command descriptions for listen modes
description: Follow-up after aligning /rt listen with the control API: the runtime command descriptions still omit /rt listen from /rt usage and document /rt-listen as only [ptt|vad] even though continuous is supported. Update descriptions so command discovery matches current behavior, and add tests. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Add fixed right-side kitty image preview placement
description: Extend the Pi kitty image preview extension with a fixed right-side overlay/column placement so screenshots can stay visible outside the scrolling editor area. Use non-capturing Pi overlays where available, force anchored Unicode placeholder rendering for the side placement, keep above/below widget behavior, update docs/tests, and release a new package tag.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:5nefmjf5xnxv9naq

title: Add Outlook and Teams blessed config examples
description: After the core runner exists, add example blessed configs for Outlook and Teams with conservative read-only notification/calendar/message-summary actions, documenting auth expectations and DOM selector maintenance. Parent bd-ee8e57; depends on bd-bf9c5e.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Implement app automation config loader and deterministic action runner
description: Add the core Pi extension runtime for loading blessed app configs, listing apps/actions, dry-running plans, and executing deterministic Playwright/Tendril steps through a small bridge rather than forcing agents to hand-write browser commands. Include tests for config validation and safe command construction. Parent bd-ee8e57; depends on bd-bf9c5e.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Realtime plugin: reject extra /rt subcommand arguments
description: Follow-up after realtime mode validation: /rt parses only the first two tokens, so commands like /rt start ptt typo or /rt audio off typo silently ignore extra tokens. Add lightweight arity validation for explicit /rt subcommands, warn without changing state on extra arguments, and add tests/docs. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.

title: Realtime plugin: validate controls.listen modes
description: Follow-up after slash-command mode validation: /rt mic/start/stt now validate user modes, but direct API consumers can still call pi.realtime.listen(ctx, 'banana') and get push-to-talk fallback behavior. Validate listen modes in the unified controls API, preserve vad/continuous/ptt, add tests/docs. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.

title: Realtime plugin: expose supported option metadata on controls API
description: Follow-up after bd-788b6f and bd-c8d602: pi.realtime exposes setters for voice/backend/reasoning, and commands can print supported values, but API consumers do not have a stable controls method for discovering those supported options. Add an options/supported-options method to the unified control surface, cover it with tests, and document it in the realtime guide. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Document flake validation gotcha for renamed untracked binaries
description: While fixing bd-4e57b1, the first Nix package build failed because flakes ignored the newly renamed bin source file while it was still untracked, even though cargo test in the working tree passed. This can confuse quick binary rename validation; a short repo note or script should remind agents to stage renamed files before Nix flake builds, or run a preflight that detects untracked files referenced from Cargo.toml. Filed via reflect-session mixin from bd-4e57b1 session.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Design app automation architecture and scaffold extension contract
description: Define the initial architecture for a configurable app automation extension in agent-utils: app configs, action specs, Playwright/Tendril driver boundary, auth/session reuse policy, persisted snapshot locations, periodic action model, command naming such as /tendril-app, and first tool contracts. Deliver a repo doc plus minimal package registration/scaffold so later beads can implement Slack and canvas actions. Filed from Harry request; parent bd-ee8e57.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Make bead create timeout outcomes easier to recover without duplicate risk
description: During the bd-bf9c5e session, one caco bd create call returned an endpoint timeout/backpressure error saying the request failed before a response. Because create may or may not have reached the daemon, the agent had to manually inspect the board before retrying to avoid duplicate beads. A create idempotency key, clearer retry guidance, or a first-party 'search recent creates by caller/title' recovery hint would reduce duplicate-risk friction. Filed via reflect-session mixin from bd-bf9c5e session.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Realtime plugin: harden explicit /rt tuning subcommands
description: Follow-up after bd-fd15b0: the new explicit /rt command vocabulary includes internal voice/backend hooks but does not document them, lacks a /rt reasoning alias, and can surface validation errors as thrown exceptions instead of user-facing notifications. Add guarded /rt voice/backend/reasoning handling, tests, and docs. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Add app automation work-app overview tool
description: Add a compact overview tool for the app automation surface that combines configured Slack/Outlook/Teams/canvas apps, active refreshers, and latest snapshot digests so agents can quickly see work-app state before taking action. Follow-up hardening under bd-2fc6bf.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Add kitty graphics-backed Pi theme package
description:
Operator request from Harry via agnt-ctrl, 2026-04-29: investigate/implement shipping a Pi theme as part of the agent-utils Pi plugin/package, backed by the existing kitty graphics library with a TypeScript implementation.

Context / feasibility:
- Pi packages can ship themes: package.json supports a `pi.themes` entry and conventional `themes/` directories; packages can also ship extensions alongside themes.
- Pi themes themselves are JSON color-token definitions, but a theme+extension combination can provide richer custom rendering using the extension APIs.
- caco-tui has good Rust kitty graphics examples, but the Rust crate is not currently FFI/linkable/callable from Pi TypeScript, so implement a TypeScript renderer for now rather than trying to link the Rust crate.

Requested direction:
- Build a Pi package/extension/theme combination that uses agent-utils' kitty graphics protocol/library to render freeform graphical UI affordances.
- Prototype a small TypeScript renderer that can render lines/borders/styles into actual byte/image form suitable for kitty graphics display and Unicode placeholder placement.
- Use kitty Unicode placeholder characters to display graphical output at theme/UI locations, e.g. replacing simple ASCII prompt enclosure lines like `-----` with rendered graphics.
- Explore graphical/translucent/gradient borders around tables, agent/code blocks, or other message blocks.
- Keep the implementation in TypeScript for Pi; consult caco-tui Rust examples only as a reference for protocol/rendering behavior.
- Package any theme assets through `themes/` or package.json `pi.themes`, and any runtime behavior through the Pi extension package entries.
- Add docs/examples explaining how to install/select the theme and how the extension cooperates with the theme.
- Add tests for renderer byte output/protocol generation and for package manifest discovery where practical.

Important constraints:
- Do not globally clear/delete kitty graphics images; coordinate with bd-f89780's scoped image ownership/cleanup work.
- Avoid redrawing/destroying the Caco/Pi UI; all image placement/deletion should be scoped to the extension-owned images/placeholders.
- Preserve existing terminal/tmux placeholder behavior.

Controller triage notes:
- Pi docs confirm packages can ship themes via package.json `pi.themes` or conventional `themes/` directories.
- Duplicate searches for `kitty theme`, `unicode placeholder theme`, and `graphical borders` found no matching bead across all statuses.
- Main-history keyword check found prior kitty graphics/image preview work, but not this theme-backed graphical rendering feature.
- Depends on bd-f89780 because scoped image ownership/cleanup is prerequisite safety for using kitty graphics to decorate core UI regions.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Tendril sharing: add preview, stream, and name target follow-ups
description: Follow-up to /tendril sharing requested by Harry: add user-facing polish for captured screenshots. Scope: allow target lookup by name as well as id, add low-resolution long-period /tendril stream mode for periodic screenshot sharing, and provide operator-visible preview/history feedback for captures where practical. Include tests and docs.

title: Add markdown-to-canvas sync workflow for web canvas editors

Include continuous refresh semantics and persisted source/export paths. Parent bd-ee8e57; depends on bd-bf9c5e.

title: Add live Outlook and Teams extraction selectors

Add conservative selectors for notifications and calendar/meeting items, auth-required handling, and tests with fixture extraction payloads. Follow-up from bd-a7835e and bd-ee8e57.

title: Realtime plugin: align defaults documentation with Pulse-first setup
description: Audit finding from bd-db8405 plus operator correction: the source header describes PI_RT_AUDIO_BACKEND auto behaviour, while the extension intentionally defaults to Pulse because the normal setup often uses Pulse even on macOS with phone sink/source. Update docs/comments/status text so this intended Pulse-first default is clear without suggesting the code should switch away from Pulse.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Realtime plugin: validate /rt status arguments
description: Follow-up after realtime command validation work: /rt status currently treats any argument other than full as compact status, so typos such as /rt status ful silently produce compact output. Validate status modes, warn without changing widget state for unsupported values, expose statusModes through pi.realtime.options(), and add tests/docs. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Profile audit: controller reified instructions include worker lifecycle conflicts
description: Profile audit finding from pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl reified instructions. The actual reified instruction files above checkout combine generic worker lifecycle constraints with the project-controller persistent role. Generic Managed Agent Constraints say every managed agent is working an assigned bead, should start by running caco bd show, and when finished must commit and run caco agent complete. The project-controller profile for this same agent says it is a persistent controller, must not pick up worker tasks or implement application code, must not call caco agent complete, and should use reintegrate only for controller-owned operational changes. There is also recurring-task ambiguity: generic guidance says to use daemon-managed caco cron for recurring tasks, while project-controller/Pi guidance says per-controller self-check loops should stay inside the Pi runtime and not rely on daemon-global cron. Impact: persistent controllers receive contradictory lifecycle/startup/scheduling instructions and may mistakenly behave as bead workers. Please triage/profile-materialization so persistent controllers get role-specific lifecycle guidance without worker-only completion/hydration requirements and clarify scheduling precedence.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Realtime plugin: validate /rt audio and widget arguments
description: Follow-up after bd-78ed46: /rt start, mic, and stt modes are validated, but /rt audio <arg> and /rt widget <arg> still accept arbitrary values and fall through to toggle/show behavior. Validate audio/widget arguments, warn without changing state for unsupported values, and add tests/docs. Filed from user request to continue realtime beads.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Audit and polish realtime plugin Pi API UX controls

Prefer Playwright DOM extraction; document auth-state fallback and limitations. Parent bd-ee8e57; depends on bd-bf9c5e.

Add a small diagnostics/health block to snapshots with last response/playback errors and mic counters so UI consumers can surface problems without parsing /rt-doctor text. Add tests/docs. title: Build configurable app automation surface for API-less web apps
description: Create a Pi-native agent-utils extension shape for driving authenticated web apps such as Slack, Outlook, Teams, and canvas editors through deterministic Playwright/Tendril actions rather than bespoke one-off shell scripts. The extension should expose agent-visible tools, blessed app configs, persisted snapshots, and periodic refresh hooks. Filed from Harry request to build a Slack/canvas automation helper and generalize it into a tendril-app style app automation framework.

title: Realtime plugin: add rt-doctor diagnostics
description: Audit finding from bd-db8405: audio/API failures are hard to diagnose. Add /rt-doctor or /rt-status full showing resolved provider/backend, record/playback commands, Pulse/CoreAudio/device hints, API/model config, last mic/playback errors, connection phase, and actionable remediation notes. Pulse should remain the normal default, including macOS phone sink/source workflows.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9

title: Improve kitty graphics multiviewer navigation and scoped cleanup
description:
Operator request from Harry via agnt-ctrl, 2026-04-29: improve the Pi kitty graphics image display extension/multiviewer.

Requested behavior:
- Add controls/commands for the multiviewer to move through images explicitly: e.g. /kitty-show-next and /kitty-show-prev.
- Add a timed cycling mode: e.g. /kitty-start-cycle 5 to cycle images every 5 seconds and /kitty-stop-cycle to stop. If there is an existing command naming convention, follow it, but provide equivalent next/previous/start/stop-cycle behavior.
- Make the multiviewer UI expose these controls clearly enough for users.
- Fix image cleanup/deletion: the plugin appears to be killing all kitty graphics images in the entire terminal. When run inside caco this redraws/destroys the entire UI. The extension must only manage/delete the kitty images it created.

Implementation guidance:
- Track image IDs / placements / namespaces owned by this extension, and scope clear/delete operations to those owned resources only.
- Avoid global kitty graphics clear/delete sequences that affect unrelated images or the caco UI.
- Preserve existing tmux/placeholder placement behavior and current preview commands.
- Add/update tests and docs for navigation, cycle controls, and scoped cleanup behavior.
- Verify with the project’s normal test suite or targeted tests if the full suite is not practical.

Controller triage notes:
- Existing closed bead bd-74597a covers the original Pi kitty graphics extension, not these multiviewer/cycle/scoped-cleanup changes.
- Search/main-history check did not find an already-landed multiviewer cycle/scoped cleanup change on main before filing this bead.
creator: pocket4:agent-utils:pocket4-agent-utils-agnt-ctrl

title: Realtime plugin: simplify slash command semantics
description: Audit finding from bd-db8405: /rt, /rt ptt, /rt nolisten, /rt stt, /rt-on, /rt-off, /rt-stop, and /rt-listen have overloaded meanings that are hard to predict. Redesign commands around explicit actions such as start/stop, mic vad|ptt|off, audio on|off, stt start|stop, widget show|hide, while preserving compatibility aliases where practical.
creator: ms-mac:agent-utils:l7fipzlhc4u4d0t9
